query: ("cool roof" OR "cool roofing" OR "green roof" OR "green roofing" OR "living roof" OR "vegetated roof" OR "roof garden" OR "reflective roof" OR "white roof" OR "high-albedo roof") AND (temperature OR "ambient temperature" OR "air temperature" OR "surface temperature" OR "urban heat island" OR UHI OR "heat exposure" OR "thermal comfort") AND (mortality OR morbidity OR "heat-related illness" OR cardiovascular OR respiratory OR health) AND ("randomized controlled trial" OR RCT OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "causal inference" OR intervention OR evaluation)
